payload.description: Converge two ISO-timestamp parsers into a single core.parse_ts primitive (F11b); explicit encoding=utf-8 sweep on all text file I/O (F11-encoding); honest reducer last-line docstring (F6); unify #51 bleed-count wording (F15). Closes the last fresh-eyes review debts.

payload.reason: Two-actor plan review round 1: Claude subagent APPROVE (all 6 load-bearing claims verified TRUE, incl. live-reproduced reducer TypeError); Codex REVISE with plan-text/contract fixes only (test paths, scope-list, aware-UTC normalization) — no design dispute. Design converged; enumerated fixes to be folded into the plan before coding + confirmed in round 2.

failed_checks.command: PATH="$(pwd)/.venv/bin:$PATH" ruff check src tests scripts

payload.suggested_fix: Re-run the failed checks locally, fix the underlying issues, then re-run `super-harness verify`.

payload.reason: Codex second-actor code review BLOCKER: parse_ts breaches its 'never raises for ANY object input' contract — _to_utc's naive .replace() is outside the guard, and the str branch catches only ValueError, so a str/datetime SUBCLASS with an overridden replace() can propagate (Codex repro: BadStr/BadNaiveDatetime RAISED). Fixing with a single outer guard + subclass regression tests, then re-verify + re-review.

Two-actor code review converged: Claude subagent APPROVE (all 5 properties verified) + Codex APPROVE (its never-raise BLOCKER fixed, verified vs its own pre-fix repro). 1627 passed, mypy/ruff/import-linter clean.

checklist.note: Closes F11b/F11-encoding/F6/F15 per REVIEW-FINDINGS SSOT; parse_ts single-primitive convergence matches plan.
All edits within declared scope (parse_ts + 2 callers + encoding sweep + reducer docstring + decision reconcile).
mypy clean (101 files), ruff clean, import-linter core-is-base KEPT. parse_ts never-raise contract now literally true (single outer guard).
Two-actor review: Codex BLOCKER (subclass replace() raise) fixed + 3 regression tests (pathological tzinfo, str/datetime subclass); mixed naive/aware TypeError fixed with RED-proven test.
F6 reducer docstring corrected to honest behavior; d-state-pure-fold reconciled (fold stays pure); plan doc synced.
